title: AI Data Control: EU Builders' Secret Weapon Against US Cloud! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that MCP tunnels are insufficient for data sensitivity in European AI projects. He advocates for local agents as a superior approach that delivers complete data control and enhanced security for EU builders concerned about US cloud dependencies.
